lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Several mechanical components require repair and maintenance.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like shine and no chips or scratches. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with premium materials that look untouched and all electronics functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a meticulously maintained engine and a complete, documented service history. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer seeking a vehicle in impeccable, factory-fresh state.

Experience the ultimate in automotive excellence with this stunning, mint-condition beauty! It’s in showroom quality, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that still looks and feels brand new. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained to the highest standard, offering a smooth, perfect ride for its next owner. Truly a rare gem that must be seen to be believed!

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor rust spots. The interior shows signs of regular use, including fading and small stains on the upholstery. All mechanical components are functional, though some parts show wear typical for its age.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint retains a strong shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper consistent with normal use. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of odors; however, there is some light bolster wear on the driver's leather seat. Mechanically, the car is solid, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine. All major features, including the climate control and infotainment system, are fully functional. It is a reliable choice for anyone looking for a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for the road.

Presenting an automotive masterpiece in impeccable condition. This vehicle has been maintained to the most exacting standards, offering a showroom-quality aesthetic and unrivaled mechanical integrity. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, ensuring a driving experience that is virtually indistinguishable from new. This represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands perfection without compromise.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it is in such incredible shape that you’d think it just rolled right off the showroom floor! I’ve totally babied this car, and it looks absolutely flawless inside and out—it's been kept in truly pristine condition. If you’re looking for a ride that feels brand new and has been loved every mile of the way, this is the one for you. I’d love for it to go to a great home, so give me a shout and let's get you behind the wheel!

This FD3S RX-7 represents a rare, concours-level preservation of Mazda’s rotary legacy. The 13B-REW powerplant maintains factory-spec compression across all rotors, delivering seamless sequential transition through the Hitachi twin-turbocharger system. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, featuring original double-wishbone suspension geometry and a Torsen limited-slip differential that provides surgical turn-in precision. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. All original parts. Recent professional detail.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive care, presenting in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner and kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with a professional ceramic coating and zero imperfections. The interior is equally flawless, featuring pristine leather upholstery with no bolster wear, original protective mats, and a cabin that still retains its factory scent. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history detailing every scheduled maintenance. From the smooth-shifting transmission to the responsive handling, every component operates with precision. This is a collector-grade example for a buyer who demands the absolute best.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in an uncompromising state of preservation. Every detail, from the lustrous paintwork to the immaculate cabin, reflects a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically robust and visually indistinguishable from its original showroom delivery, this specimen offers a rare opportunity for the collector or enthusiast who seeks unparalleled quality. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the most discerning motorist.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of automotive care, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a flawless interior cabin. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising standards for excellence. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers an unrivaled driving experience and investment-grade quality.

Hey! You’ve gotta see this beauty! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s in pristine, showroom condition. It’s been garage-kept and pampered since day one—not a single blemish to be found! It drives like a total dream, and I’m sure the next owner is going to be just as obsessed as I’ve been. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records available.

Step into automotive perfection with this absolute gem. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with a professional ceramic coating that makes the paint pop—not a single stone chip, swirl mark, or door ding is present. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather seats are supple and entirely free of creases, and every interior surface feels factory-fresh. All electronic components, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, function with absolute precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a documented history of single-ownership, this car represents the pinnacle of its class. It drives with the tightness and responsiveness of a brand-new vehicle, offering a smooth, silent, and powerful experience. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly pristine, investment-grade example.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are beyond reproach, representing the pinnacle of its class. An acquisition for the individual who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, every detail confirms its status as a premier acquisition. We invite discerning buyers to experience a standard of automotive excellence that is rarely preserved to this degree.

Hey everyone! You have to see this gorgeous ride! It’s in absolutely pristine, mint condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just left the showroom. I’ve totally babied this car since day one, so it’s super clean, shiny, and runs like an absolute dream. If you're looking for that 'brand new' experience without the brand new price tag, this is definitely the one for you! Come swing by and take a look, you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp with a linear power band and an 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically flawless, the VANOS system has been overhauled, and the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced to ensure structural rigidity. It features a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission with crisp shift gates and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis is optimized with Bilstein PSS10 coilovers, maintaining exceptional dampening and rebound characteristics. Pristine condition. Garage kept. No scratches or mechanical issues. Full service records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'mint condition.' This car has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a showroom-quality exterior free of any stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks. The paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster, complemented by pristine alloy wheels wrapped in premium tires. Stepping inside, the interior is a masterclass in preservation; the high-grade leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and all original trim pieces are perfectly intact. Mechanically, the vehicle is flawless, boasting a comprehensive service history with every scheduled maintenance performed ahead of time by certified technicians. Every feature, from the advanced driver-assistance systems to the premium audio setup, operates with precision. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality and seeks a vehicle that looks and performs exactly as it did on the showroom floor.

We are proud to present this peerless specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. The vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that is indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that meets the original manufacturer's specifications. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers an unrivaled ownership experience.

Presenting a vehicle of superlative quality, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior, reflecting a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically superior, it represents a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking an investment-grade example of this model.

Hey there! I'm honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it's time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken incredible care of it, and it's been garage-kept and babied since day one. If you're looking for total perfection, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. Original paint. Clean title. Interior is flawless. Full service history provided.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, maintained to a standard that rivals its first day on the showroom floor. This vehicle has been kept in a climate-controlled environment, preserving the deep, mirror-like luster of its original paint, which is entirely free of chips, swirls, or imperfections. The interior is equally breathtaking, featuring supple, unscuffed premium leather and high-gloss accents that show zero signs of wear. Every technological feature and driver-assist system functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach; it comes with a comprehensive, documented service history showing all preventative maintenance performed by certified specialists. Riding on a fresh set of high-performance tires with zero curb rash on the wheels, this car offers a tight, quiet, and powerful driving experience. For the discerning buyer seeking a collector-grade vehicle that requires absolutely no apologies, this is the definitive choice.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no signs of wear and a flawless mechanical profile. An uncompromising acquisition for the discerning collector who demands perfection and absolute integrity in their next vehicle.
